scripts.smoke:discord: PYTHONPATH=${DISCORD_PY_SELF_ROOT:?Set DISCORD_PY_SELF_ROOT to discord.py-self checkout} python3 scripts/discord-clip-smoke.py
scripts.smoke:discord:quote: PYTHONPATH=${DISCORD_PY_SELF_ROOT:?Set DISCORD_PY_SELF_ROOT to discord.py-self checkout} python3 scripts/discord-quote-autocomplete-smoke.py
scripts.smoke:discord:all: bun run smoke:discord:quote && bun run smoke:discord
scripts.smoke:live: docker compose --profile app exec -T jellybot bun run src/cli/smoke-live.ts
